pr.title: 1.1085 BPB: JEPA + AdamW TTT + Full GPTQ + FA3 + LZMA

output.summary: JEPA auxiliary loss plus AdamW test-time training on EMA weights before full-Hessian GPTQ, Flash-Attention 3, LZMA, and XSA across every layer.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Submission performs standard training plus evaluation; no val-only training regime was used.
techniques: Pre-quantization AdamW TTT on EMA weights
